name: English Muffin Pizza
recipeIngredient: 6 oz tomato paste or pizza sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Place the split English muffins on a baking sheet.
3. Spread the tomato paste evenly over each muffin half, leaving some space around the edges for toppings.
4. Sprinkle oregano and garlic powder over the tomato paste.
5. If using basil, sprinkle it over the top as well.
6. Bake in the preheated oven until the cheese is melted and bubbly, about 10-12 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
